title: eucryphia × intermedia
intro: Eucryphia × intermedia, a hybrid plant known as the Red Flowering Peppermint or Red Flowering Gum, is a member of the Eucryphiaceae family native to New Zealand. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antibacterial agent. The health benefits of Eucryphia × intermedia include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues and its ability to lower blood pressure. Herbal preparations of the plant include tinctures, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
